title: citronella philippinensis
intro: Citronella philippinensis, also known as the East Indian citronella, is a tropical grass native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The citronella philippinensis plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and even exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Citronella philippinensis is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, tea, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
